examples: He was given experimental chemical castration as a "treatment".
Figuring that a few broken bones was better than castration, he jumped out of the window after the boulder.
And someone started leaving chopped-up sausages on his car, a possible reference to castration. Bill and his family moved house.
Some protesters called for harsher punishments for convicted rapists, such as chemical castration and the death penalty.
"I call it the systematic castration of the groundfish fleet, " said Cattone.
